## PR Summary
- What changed:
- Why this change is needed:

## Safety Checklist
- [ ] This change does **not** alter existing business logic unintentionally.
- [ ] API request/response contracts remain backward compatible.
- [ ] User-facing success/error messages are clear and user-friendly.
- [ ] No raw internal error/stack details are shown to end users.

## Validation
- [ ] Manual regression tested critical flow(s) touched by this PR.
- [ ] `npm run lint` executed for changed files.
- [ ] If API behavior touched, verified status codes and payload shape.

## Message Quality (Mandatory)
- [ ] Reused centralized message helpers/catalog for new/updated messages.
- [ ] Added actionable wording for error states where applicable.
